source_name: Code4rena Kinetiq Findings and Analysis Report (2025-04)
finding_title: Incorrect Balance Check in Validator Redelegation Process May Block Legitimate Rebalancing Operations
summary: The processValidatorRedelegation function in the StakingManager contract contains an incorrect balance check that could prevent legitimate rebalancing operations from being executed. The function checks the HyperEVM balance of the StakingManager contract, but the funds being redelegated exist on HyperCore, not on the HyperEVM.
root_cause: redelegation checks the HyperEVM contract balance even though the redelegated funds already reside on HyperCore/L1, causing false insufficient-balance reverts
broken_invariants: validator redelegation must validate balances in the domain where the funds actually reside
cross-domain staking operations must not use EVM balance as a proxy for HyperCore/L1 delegated or undelegated funds
legitimate rebalancing must not be blocked by an irrelevant local contract balance check
attack_preconditions: Protocol state reaches the report-described edge case or queue configuration
Relevant manager/operator/user flow is executed as described in the public finding
attacker_capability: external user or operational actor able to trigger the affected protocol path
trigger_actions: execute the affected function sequence described in the report
observe accounting/state transition divergence or operation failure

impact.description: The processValidatorRedelegation function in the StakingManager contract contains an incorrect balance check that could prevent legitimate rebalancing operations from being executed. The function checks the HyperEVM balance of the StakingManager contract, but the funds being redelegated exist on HyperCore, not on the HyperEVM.

why_not_higher: the report classified this as Medium rather than High; impact is bounded to disruption, bypass, or indirect value loss rather than unconditional total protocol loss
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with concrete affected code paths and exploit/impact narrative
common_false_positive_angles: check whether the affected function is actually reachable under current roles/pauses/configuration
check whether sponsor mitigations or operational assumptions fully eliminate the stated state transition
check whether the code version and line links match the audited commit
mitigations: Remove the incorrect balance check from the processValidatorRedelegation function: function processValidatorRedelegation(uint256 amount) external nonReentrant whenNotPaused { require(msg.sender == address(validatorManager), "Only ValidatorManager"); require(amount > 0, "Invalid amount"); - require(address(this).balance >= amount, "Insufficient balance"); _distributeStake(amount, OperationType.RebalanceDeposit); }
